title: Park Patrol
subtitle: Your local park is its own ecosystem
intro: A park is a habitat -- soil, trees, edges, water. Find three pieces of it.
outro: You just turned a walk into research.

steps.hint: Get the bark or a leaf in the photo. Both help with ID.
A bird, a bee, a butterfly, a fly -- whatever you can get a clear shot of.

steps.description: Find something on the ground you haven't logged before
steps.hint: Mushroom, pinecone with a bug on it, a snail trail. Look down.
